text.tspan: Mean income or consumption per day: 2011 vs. 2017 prices
This data is adjusted for inflation and differences in living costs between countries.

g.text: Mean income or consumption per day (2011 prices)
Mean income or consumption per day (2017 prices)

text.tspan: Data source: World Bank Poverty and Inequality Platform (2024)

Note: Depending on the country and year, it relates to income (measured after taxes and benefits) or to consumption,
per capita
. Following an

update, World Bank PIP now uses 2021
international-$
for its poverty and inequality data
available here
.
